summary: PROMPT 8 (Admin Panel + 4 audit fixes + Billing/Success + Privacy/Terms) fully validated. Backend pytest 21/21 PASS against gameon_dev preview covering /api/admin/{login(200/401), stats, groups(list/filter/search/detail/404), users(list/search/detail/404), payments}, /api/groups/{gid}/seasons/hall-of-fame (PRO ok with structure check + FREE 402/403), /api/groups/{gid}/cash/export?format=csv|json (PRO admin OK CSV header parsed + JSON payload with currency=EUR + FREE 402/403), and /api/matches/{mid}/teams/transfer validation (400 same team / 422 invalid team enum). Frontend RN-web: admin/login screen renders with admin-email/admin-password/admin-toggle-pw/admin-submit; login flow stores admin_token in localStorage (149 chars JWT) and replaces to /admin/dashboard; dashboard shows 6 stat cards (stat-users=11, stat-groups=2, stat-active-matches=2, stat-pro=1, stat-free=1, stat-trial=0) + revenue-card (0.00€, signups_last_7=11, matches_last_7=4) + nav-groups/nav-users/admin-logout; /admin/groups renders screen-admin-groups + ag-search + 4 ag-plan-{ALL/PRO/FREE/TRIAL} chips + 2 ag-item-* cards (Спортна София SPORT26 FREE / ДИТ Неделя DIT2026 PRO); /admin/users renders screen-admin-users + au-search + 11 au-item-* with masked phones (+359***0001…0010) + color-graded reliability badges (100/98/97/96/94/92/87/86/85). Audit FIX 2 verified: /(tabs)/stats with DIT2026 PRO renders leaderboard-card + points-config exact text 'Точкуване: Победа=3, Равен=1, Загуба=0' + 1 hof-{seasonId} card (Зима 2025) + 3 hof-{seasonId}-{idx} champion rows with gold/silver/bronze medals + points + coefficient. Audit FIX 3 verified: /cash?groupId=DIT2026 shows cash-export icon button in header (PRO+admin). Audit FIX 4 verified: points-config text rendered exactly per spec. Billing/success: /billing/success?session_id=cs_test_fake_session passes AuthGuard after super-test login, polls billingApi.getCheckoutStatus, gets 404 → renders billing-error + billing-retry states correctly. Privacy + Terms: screen-privacy + privacy-back render; screen-terms + terms-back render. Admin AuthGuard correctly skips /admin/* segment (admin login worked without user JWT). apiClient correctly attaches admin_token for /admin/* paths.
not_fully_exercised_in_browser: Cash export ActionSheet on web → window.prompt fallback was not triggered in browser (would block Playwright); backend /cash/export csv+json verified at API level. The cash-export button is visible and clickable.

billing-paid success state — would require either a real Stripe webhook or backend mutation; only billing-error path was exercised. billing-checking + billing-pending states gated on timer/poll responses, not isolated.

TeamsTab transfer-{userId} + return-{userId} buttons in match room — backend transfer endpoint validation tested at API level (400 same team, 422 invalid team enum). UI not exercised because match room requires a specific match ID + team setup.
Pagination via ag-load-more / au-load-more — only 2 groups + 11 users seeded so load-more never appears.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/admin.py — Admin JWT correctly signed with shared JWT_SECRET, 12h TTL, admin_required dep verifies is_admin claim. Email/password compared against env (ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD). MVP-grade auth — for production add password hashing (bcrypt) and rate limiting on /admin/login.

/app/backend/routes/admin.py:117 — admin_groups plan filter is applied AFTER skip/limit, so pagination + plan filter combined may return fewer items than `limit`. Acceptable for MVP small dataset; recommend pre-filtering by plan in Mongo query for scalability.

/app/backend/routes/seasons.py:236-257 — hall_of_fame correctly filters {closed_at: {$ne: null}} and skips seasons with empty champions[]. Response shape [{season:{id,name,start_at,end_at}, champions:[...]}] matches FE expectation.

/app/backend/routes/cash.py:274-322 — export uses StreamingResponse for CSV (good for large groups) and JSONResponse for JSON. CSV header is well-formed (Date/Type/Category/Amount/Currency/Note/Status/CreatedBy). Authorization: PRO + admin gate correctly applied.

/app/backend/routes/matches.py:1471-1510 — transfer_player correctly blocks captain transfer + same-team + locked teams; uses $pull then $push pattern (non-atomic but acceptable for non-critical state). pick_order team field is updated.

Frontend AuthGuard / apiClient: from FE behavior, /admin/* segment is correctly skipped for user-token AuthGuard, and admin_token is auto-attached for /admin/* fetches. Verified via successful admin login flow without user session.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all testIDs from spec present and functional)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@gameon.bg / admin_secure_password_2026! → POST /api/admin/login → admin_token (12h TTL, localStorage key 'admin_token'). User: POST /api/auth/super-test-login → +359888999999 Super Tester (OWNER of SPORT26 FREE + DIT2026 PRO).
seed_data_creation: None. Backend tests are read-only (admin GETs + cash export GETs + hall-of-fame GET) plus 2 transfer-validation POSTs that intentionally fail (400/422). No persistent mutation to gameon_dev.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PROMPT 8 fully validated. Reusable regression at /app/backend/tests/test_prompt8.py (21 tests; covers full admin panel + HOF + cash export + transfer validation). KEY GOTCHAS: (1) Admin search backend regex matches `name` field — DIT2026 group name is Cyrillic 'ДИТ Неделя', NOT Latin 'DIT'; entry_code search would need a separate $or clause if needed. (2) admin token stored in localStorage key 'admin_token' (separate from user 'token'). (3) AuthGuard skips /admin/* segment so admin login works without user session. (4) billing/success polling on bogus session_id correctly transitions to billing-error+billing-retry; happy-path billing-paid state requires real Stripe session or backend mark-paid mutation. (5) Hall of Fame seeded data: DIT2026 has 1 closed season 'Зима 2025' with 3 champions (gold/silver/bronze). (6) cash-export button: PRO+admin gated; SPORT26 FREE returns 402/403.
